full_description: Focus Timer is a productivity app that uses the Pomodoro technique to help you stay on track and avoid distractions. The Pomodoro technique involves working in focused, 25-minute increments, followed by a 5-minute break. This technique can help you boost your focus, increase your productivity, and achieve your goals. With Focus Timer, you can customize the length of your work sessions and breaks to fit your needs. The app also includes features such as statistics tracking, so you can see how much time you've spent working and how many sessions you've completed. Whether you're a student, a professional, or simply someone looking to get more done, Focus Timer can help. Download the app today and start achieving your goals!
